name: @bluebubbles/bbd
description: bbd — the headless BlueBubbles daemon. Phase 0 scaffold: core primitives (DI, event bus, logger, lifecycle, Result) and the host-platform boundary that the legacy server is incrementally strangled into.
//note-pino: The production Logger impl wraps pino, kept OUT of the core so logging stays an injectable abstraction (this is what breaks the legacy Logger->Server circular dependency). See src/core/logger.ts.
